payload.title: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority Open Data Plan 2024 Annual Update
payload.description: Second annual update to the original MTA Open Data Plan, covering 2023 activities and 2024 focus areas

evidence_refs.source_quote: THE METROPOLITAN TRANSPORTATION AUTHORITY OPEN DATA PLAN 2024 ANNUAL UPDATE
The MTA Open Data team is proud to release its second annual update to the original open data plan.

tool_args.raw_text: Two of our biggest new dataset releases this year were about subway hourly ridership and bus hourly ridership.

tool_args.raw_text: The MTA public five open datasets in conjunction with the release of the MTA's 20-Year Needs Assessment

tool_args.label: Staten Island Railway datasets published in fall 2023
tool_args.raw_text: We published three datasets in the fall focused on Staten Island Railway for On-Time Performance, Scheduled Trips, and Mean Distance Between Failures.

payload.description: Publication of three standalone Staten Island Railway datasets: On-Time Performance, Scheduled Trips, and Mean Distance Between Failures

evidence_refs.source_quote: We published three datasets in the fall focused on Staten Island Railway for On-Time Performance, Scheduled Trips, and Mean Distance Between Failures.

tool_args.label: Hourly Subway and Bus Ridership datasets published in 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Two of our biggest (literally and figuratively!) new dataset releases this year were about subway hourly ridership and bus hourly ridership.

payload.description: Publication of hourly subway ridership data (by station-complex, payment method, and fare class) and hourly bus ridership data (by route, payment method, and fare class)

evidence_refs.source_quote: Two of our biggest (literally and figuratively!) new dataset releases this year were about subway hourly ridership and bus hourly ridership.

tool_args.label: Open Data User Personas published in early 2023
tool_args.raw_text: In early 2023, we published our Open Data User Personas, a human-centered design tool that facilitates the consideration of real data users

payload.description: Publication of Open Data User Personas, a human-centered design tool developed through stakeholder workshops

evidence_refs.source_quote: In early 2023, we published our Open Data User Personas, a human-centered design tool that facilitates the consideration of real data users with a variety of goals, needs, and technical abilities.

tool_args.label: GitHub repository published for Open Data Week 2023
tool_args.raw_text: We also published a GitHub repository for Open Data Week 2023, with the goal of demonstrating how to use Python to analyze and visualize MTA Open Data sets available on data.ny.gov.

payload.description: Publication of a GitHub repository for Open Data Week 2023 demonstrating Python analysis and visualization of MTA Open Data

evidence_refs.source_quote: We also published a GitHub repository for Open Data Week 2023, with the goal of demonstrating how to use Python to analyze and visualize MTA Open Data sets available on data.ny.gov.

tool_args.label: MTA Data & Analytics blog launched in late 2023
tool_args.raw_text: At the end of the year, we launched the MTA Data & Analytics blog, offering a platform for sharing insights, updates and best practices related to MTA data.

payload.description: Launch of the MTA Data & Analytics blog featuring contributions from the broader Data & Analytics team

evidence_refs.source_quote: At the end of the year, we launched the MTA Data & Analytics blog, offering a platform for sharing insights, updates and best practices related to MTA data.

tool_args.label: Subway performance metrics dataset documentation improved in 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Starting with our subway performance metrics datasets, we enhanced the clarity, completeness, and accessibility of the dataset documentation

payload.description: Enhanced clarity, completeness, and accessibility of subway performance metrics dataset documentation, focusing on methodology sections

evidence_refs.source_quote: Starting with our subway performance metrics datasets, we enhanced the clarity, completeness, and accessibility of the dataset documentation, focusing extensively on the dataset methodology sections of the overview documents that accompany each dataset.

tool_args.label: metrics.mta.info enhancements throughout 2023
tool_args.raw_text: throughout the year, we continued to build out our open data visualization site, metrics.mta.info, enhancing its functionality, performance, and user experience

payload.description: Continued development of metrics.mta.info open data visualization site with new interactive features, expanded visualizations, and data connections with the NYS open data portal

evidence_refs.source_quote: throughout the year, we continued to build out our open data visualization site, metrics.mta.info, enhancing its functionality, performance, and user experience based on feedback from our stakeholders.

tool_args.label: Operating Budget Data publication planned for Q1 2024
tool_args.raw_text: At the end of Q1 2024, the MTA plans to publish the agency's operating budget data in machine-readable formats.

payload.description: Planned publication of MTA operating budget data in machine-readable formats, including statement of operations, subsidy information, and employee counts

evidence_refs.source_quote: At the end of Q1 2024, the MTA plans to publish the agency's operating budget data in machine-readable formats.

tool_args.label: Congestion Pricing Data releases planned for 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Beginning with the launch of the Congestion Pricing program, the MTA will begin publishing data related to program implementation.

payload.description: Planned publication of Congestion Pricing program data including toll crossings, revenue generated, and vehicle speeds, on a rolling basis

evidence_refs.source_quote: Beginning with the launch of the Congestion Pricing program, which will charge drivers a toll for entering Manhattan below 60 Street, the MTA will begin publishing data related to program implementation.

tool_args.label: MTA Open Data Act commitment
tool_args.raw_text: In October 2021, New York State Governor Hochul signed the MTA Open Data Act into law, prompting the MTA to renew our commitment to proactively sharing high quality, machine-readable data with the public through data.ny.gov.

payload.claim_text: The MTA Open Data Act prompted the MTA to renew commitment to proactively sharing high quality, machine-readable data with the public through data.ny.gov.
payload.description: Commitment renewed in response to the MTA Open Data Act signed in October 2021

evidence_refs.source_quote: In October 2021, New York State Governor Hochul signed the MTA Open Data Act into law, prompting the MTA to renew our commitment to proactively sharing high quality, machine-readable data with the public through data.ny.gov.

tool_args.label: Operating budget data to be published Q1 2024
tool_args.raw_text: At the end of Q1 2024, the MTA plans to publish the agency's operating budget data in machine-readable formats.

payload.description: Planned publication of operating budget data including statement of operations, subsidy information, number of employees by agency and position function

evidence_refs.source_quote: At the end of Q1 2024, the MTA plans to publish the agency's operating budget data in machine-readable formats.

tool_args.label: Congestion pricing data to be published

evidence_refs.source_quote: Beginning with the launch of the Congestion Pricing program, which will charge drivers a toll for entering Manhattan below 60 Street, the MTA will begin publishing data related to program implementation.

tool_args.label: New level of data granularity for subway and bus ridership
tool_args.raw_text: This is a new level of data granularity for the MTA, and it has been well received.

payload.claim_text: Hourly subway ridership broken down by station-complex, payment method, and fare class, and hourly bus ridership broken down by route, payment method, and fare class, represents a new level of data granularity for the MTA.
payload.description: New data granularity for hourly ridership datasets published in 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: This is a new level of data granularity for the MTA, and it has been well received.

tool_args.label: First public data on asset condition
tool_args.raw_text: This is the first time the MTA has publicly provided data on the condition of most of its assets and fleets.

payload.claim_text: This is the first time the MTA has publicly provided data on the condition of most of its assets and fleets.
payload.description: 20-Year Needs Assessment data includes first-ever public asset condition data

evidence_refs.source_quote: This is the first time the MTA has publicly provided data on the condition of most of its assets and fleets.

tool_args.label: First quantitative assessment of expansion projects
tool_args.raw_text: the first-ever quantitative and comprehensive assessment of the costs and benefits of potential expansion and enhancements

payload.claim_text: The Comparative Evaluation dataset includes the first-ever quantitative and comprehensive assessment of the costs and benefits of potential expansion and enhancements.
payload.description: 20-Year Needs Assessment Comparative Evaluation dataset includes criteria such as ridership, time savings, and cost

evidence_refs.source_quote: the first-ever quantitative and comprehensive assessment of the costs and benefits of potential expansion and enhancements

tool_args.label: First standalone Staten Island Railway datasets
tool_args.raw_text: These are the first standalone datasets for the sole rail line on Staten Island and go back to 2006, farther than nearly all MTA datasets on Open NY.

evidence_refs.source_quote: These are the first standalone datasets for the sole rail line on Staten Island and go back to 2006, farther than nearly all MTA datasets on Open NY.

payload.description: Staten Island Railway Scheduled Trips dataset is a first for the MTA

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Scheduled Trips dataset is the first by the MTA to show scheduled service levels over time

tool_args.label: Internal data infrastructure development in 2023
